nodes.label: Zero Build Step Design
nodes.rationale: Runs directly in the browser with native ES module imports — no bundler, no transpiler, no build pipeline. Reduces complexity and deployment friction.

nodes.label: Anti-Detection Design Rationale
nodes.rationale: Playwright is patched at node_modules level to automatically apply stealth plugins (playwright-ghost + patchright) so any code importing playwright gets anti-detection by default. Purpose: pass bot detection on fingerprint-heavy sites like WhatsApp Web.

nodes.label: CSP Domain Whitelist Design
nodes.rationale: Content-Security-Policy restricts connect-src to only the Supabase project domain and esm.sh CDN, limiting outbound network access to trusted backends only.

nodes.label: Agent API (Programmatic / URL-mode for AI agents)
nodes.norm_label: agent api (programmatic / url-mode for ai agents)
